offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage on Indie Hackers about cash flow tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting software discussions
try_it: Let users try weekly cash flow forecast generation and alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
